title: SAFE SHELTER - 211info
text: YOUTH OUTREACH SERVICES SAFE SHELTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Temporary emergency shelter program for runaway and homeless youth. Works with families and youth to facilitate reunification in a safe/healthy manner. 719 E 1st Street Newberg, OR 97132 Eligibility: Ages 11-17 who have run away or do not have stable housing Hours: Intake:Monday-Friday 9am-8pm Emergency shelter: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (503) 538-8023 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 538-8023 Main phone (503) 550-9638 After-hours call or text Main phone (503) 538-8023 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or email for intake FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Yamhill County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 9am-8pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Next to Domino's Pizza downtown Services: Case/Care Management * Homeless Youth Youth Shelters Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY FACILITIES/CENTERS - YOUTH OUTREACH DROP-IN CENTER EMPLOYMENT - JOBS READINESS PROGRAM HOUSING/SHELTER - YOUTH TRANSITIONAL LIVING PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. YOUTH OUTREACH SERVICES
